channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Morning Minute: Dark Pool Trader Dumps $1.3B in IBIT in Single Clip
item.description: Strategy is paying down its debt instead of buying Bitcoin, and AI tokens are now massively outperforming BTC.

item.title: Trump Backs CFTC Over Prediction Markets, Calls State Officials ‘Scum’
item.description: Federal oversight gains the president’s backing as states push to bring prediction markets under their own gambling laws.

item.title: Kraken unveils Bitcoin Vault, expanding yield push for BTC holders
item.description: The new earn product lets users generate BTC-denominated rewards through DeFi strategies while keeping exposure to bitcoin’s price.

item.title: The New Compliance Floor: Organizations are Adopting Stronger Than Ever Monitoring Practices
item.description: This blog is a preview of our forthcoming report, “The New Rails: How Digital Assets Are Reshaping the Foundations of… The post The New Compliance Floor: Organizations are Adopting Stronger Than Ever Monitoring Practices appeared first on …

item.title: Singapore charges former Hodlnaut CEO Zhu Juntao over Terra collapse claims
item.description: Zhu allegedly directed staff to publish false claims that Hodlnaut had no direct exposure to the TerraUSD collapse on Telegram and in customer emails.

item.title: ETHConf brings Ethereum’s leaders, institutions, and policymakers to New York City on June 8–10
item.description: ETHConf, produced by ETHGlobal, will bring more than 5,000 attendees, 150+ speakers, and 100+ companies to the Javits Center in New York City from June 8-10, 2026 for three days focused on the future of Ethereum and institutional finance.

item.title: Crypto participants once again prefer dollars over bitcoin. USDT, USDC dominance rises.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 27, 2026

item.title: Spot HYPE ETFs absorb 1% of market cap in first 10 trading days: Kairos
item.description: Spot HYPE ETFs absorbed 1.04% of Hyperliquid’s market cap in 10 trading days, beating Bitcoin and Ether ETF debuts.

item.title: $1.3B Worth of BlackRock's IBIT Changes Hands in Dark Pool Sale
item.description: A $1.3 billion off-exchange IBIT block sale shook Bitcoin Tuesday, but experts say the real test is yet to come.

item.title: Bitcoin analysis eyes sharp rebound after BTC collapses below M2 supply 'fair value'
item.description: Bitcoin remained trapped "massively below" its "fair" level, as dictated by global liquidity trends and gold ratio, the latest BTC price analysis says.

item.title: SoFi brings bank-issued stablecoin to 15 million users in crypto push
item.description: The fintech platform says its dollar-backed stablecoin will let members trade, transfer and eventually earn yield through its banking app.

item.title: Bitcoin clings to $75,000 support as bear market signals resurface
item.description: Bitcoin hovered below Tom Lee's $76,000 bull-market threshold while hyperliquid and monero bucked broader crypto weakness.

item.title: South Korea charges CATFI memecoin operators in first DEX rug-pull case: Report
item.description: South Korean prosecutors reportedly charged a group over the CATFI memecoin rug pull, marking the country’s first DEX rug-pull case under crypto law.

item.title: Crypto exchange HTX rejects U.K. sanction allegations, says it refused ruble stablecoin listing
item.description: U.K. authorities sanctioned HTX, saying there were "reasonable grounds to suspect" the crypto exchange was helping Russia by cooperating with ruble stablecoin A7A5.

item.title: IREN shares jumps on $1.6 billion Dell deal to expand AI cloud business
item.description: The Dell agreement will support IREN’s expanding AI cloud business and boost projected annualized revenue to $4.4 billion by 2027.

item.title: Bitcoin drops to 13th largest asset as capital flees to AI and precious metals
item.description: Bitcoin’s weak 2026 performance has coincided with sharp gains in metals and semiconductor giants, raising concerns that the cryptocurrency could continue losing ground.

item.title: DeFi isn't safe anymore because AI is becoming 'superhuman' at hacking, security chief warns
item.description: As hacks pile up and DeFi TVL falls fast, one of crypto's top security executives says AI coding agents have made smart contracts fatally vulnerable.

item.title: Whale alert: Someone dumped $1.29 billion of BlackRock's bitcoin ETF in a dark pool trade
item.description: The big sale happened amid a broader continued exodus from U.S.-listed spot bitcoin ETFs.

item.title: Ethereum bull David Hoffman explains why he sold his ETH
item.description: “Ethereum got the ETH price it deserves, and I don’t see ETH being rerated as an asset, higher or lower,” says David Hoffman.

item.title: Sharplink, Forward Industries among crypto firms considered for Russell indexes
item.description: Bitmine and Galaxy Digital may also be eligible for the Russell 1000, an index tracking the largest 1,000 US companies that includes Nvidia, Microsoft and Apple.

item.title: Crypto PACs spend $9 million in Texas and score wins in both parties
item.description: Industry-backed PACs supported Democratic and Republican candidates alike, underscoring digital assets’ growing role as a cross-party electoral force.

item.title: Bitcoin’s recent drop coincides with $1.3B ‘dark pool’ ETF sale: Analyst
item.description: Galaxy Digital’s Alex Thorn says a $1.3 billion sale of BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF was the largest he has seen on a dark pool, or private trading platform.

item.title: Bitcoin vs gold: BTC's three-month uptrend has snapped
item.description: BTC's three-month uptrend against gold has broken down amid strong inflows into gold and precious metals ETFs.

item.title: XRP steadies near $1.32 as failed breakout keeps focus on narrowing trading range
item.description: XRP stayed trapped inside the same consolidation structure after another rejection near $1.36, with traders watching whether months of compression finally resolve into a larger move.

item.title: Base launches new tool to connect crypto wallets to AI agents
item.description: AI models will be able to transfer funds, swap tokens, check balances and review transaction history with a new tool from Base.

item.title: Traders watch bitcoin 'golden cross' as BTC slides to near $75,000, ZEC dives 9%
item.description: A technical setup brewing on the bitcoin chart could decide which way the market breaks next, with the largest cryptocurrency sliding even as global equities hit record highs.

item.title: Tom Lee predicts supercycle amid Bitmine’s largest Ethereum buy in 2026
item.description: Bitmine purchased 111,942 Ether last week, its biggest buy so far in 2026, after the token dropped below $2,200.

item.title: Trump backs CFTC authority over prediction markets
item.description: US President Donald Trump says it is “critically important” that the CFTC has sole authority over prediction markets, and took aim at several state officials.

item.title: U.K. Sanctions 18 Entities and Persons for Evading Russian Trade Blockades
item.description: Summary The U.K.’s Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office (FCDO) sanctioned 18 cryptocurrency exchanges, payment providers, and individuals for helping Russia… The post U.K. Sanctions 18 Entities and Persons for Evading Russian Trade…

item.title: Bitcoin drops after $78K pop, but ‘value investor’ keeps ‘hoovering up cheap’ BTC
item.description: Bitcoin’s rangebound trading carries on as bears defend $77,000 and bulls hold out near $74,000.

item.title: HYPE chases new highs as ETF inflows, institutional adoption accelerate
item.description: HYPE reached new highs above $65 following record ETF inflows, futures participation and trading volumes at Hyperliquid exchange. Is $100 next?

item.title: Crypto advocacy group challenges Senator Warren's claims on OCC charters
item.description: After Massachusetts Senator Elizabeth Warren's claimed that the comptroller may have violated US banking laws by approving crypto companies’ charters, The Digital Chamber urged the regulator to defend the applications.

item.title: Bitcoin mining stocks jump as AI infrastructure boom boosts sector outlook
item.description: Wall Street’s semiconductor-driven surge is fueling fresh momentum for crypto miners betting their power-heavy infrastructure can support the AI boom.

item.title: Some Non-Enhanced Athletes Beat Their Juiced Rivals at the 'Steroid Olympics'
item.description: The inaugural games produced a record-breaking swim, but several non-enhanced athletes still beat the enhanced competitors.

item.title: Trump praises prediction markets, defends CFTC as court cases compound
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said it was "critically important" that the CFTC keep "exclusive authority" over prediction markets, echoing CFTC Chair Michael Selig.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 President Trump says the USA is currently the Bitcoin capital of the world and other countries "are trying diligently to replace us in that capacity, but we won't let that happen." 👀 "It is a major industry, and we must protect it." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE56T3ktbGFDa1dlaHBTWTlLelE4X3ZBeXBDTVpSd0p2REdNNmxLWXkyeFdqeGFwYXZSdWYwOTVNLVNXSWNmWk03YmNxblVKNmZBYUIzVlBkRWl2d2J1UndPa0liVnRsTk0?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 President Tru…

item.title: Someone Just Destroyed $8.2 Million in Bitcoin—Why?
item.description: Five unknown addresses removed 107 Bitcoin worth $8.2 million from circulation today, sparking intrigue on social media.

item.title: This Half-Gigabyte AI Model Runs Local Agents on Your Phone
item.description: OpenBMB's 1B-parameter model brings MCP support and agentic tool use to on-device AI—but it has trouble with logic traps.

item.title: Ethereum Firm Sharplink, Solana Treasury Forward Industries Joining Russell 2000, 3000 Indexes
item.description: Crypto treasury firms Sharplink and Forward Industries will both be included in the Russell 2000 and 3000 indexes at the end of June.

item.title: If you missed the news last week, I sold my ETH.For someone who built a career, community, identity, and business around Ethereum, this choice does not come lightly.The decision to sell deserves a more thorough explanation than the scattered tweets on Twi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1pSVhYZV80Q2dSZDFwZHN1NUpIZUdyTjVGbHJJQjVrNjdMNjNtdkJIYVB1T09mQzVHdHp1ZDRRMEpHYWlPUmhKME8weE9KQXZzWDdvOWgzV0JmOWxULUwyOGxUaXRoUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">If you missed the news last …

item.title: Grand Theft Data: Threat Actors Weaponizing GTA 6 Hype, NordVPN Warns
item.description: Cybercriminals are weaponizing the hype surrounding Grand Theft Auto 6, flooding the internet with GTA phishing traps and malware.

item.title: Spain Blocks Prediction Markets Kalshi, Polymarket for Potential Gambling Law Violations
item.description: Spain is the latest country to clamp down on the rising use of prediction market platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi.

item.title: Joe Lubin-backed Ethereum treasury firm SharpLink to join the Russel indexes
item.description: The inclusion could attract fresh passive inflows from index-tracking funds, while the firm's stock tanked 95% from its peak over the past year.

item.title: AI Chatbots Show Bias Toward Catholicism, Researchers Say
item.description: Researchers find AI models steer users toward Catholicism and away from other religions, like Jehovah’s Witnesses.

item.title: $1.3 BILLION IBIT DARK POOL DUMP SHAKES BITCOIN MARKET A massive $1.29 billion dark pool block trade hit BlackRock’s $IBIT this morning, marking what traders are calling one of the largest institutional Bitcoin ETF prints ever recorded. The trade rep - x.com

item.title: UK authorities sanction HTX crypto exchange over support for Russia
item.description: Formerly Huobi Global, the exchange is the latest entity to be named as part of a crackdown on companies “exploited by Russia to circumvent UK sanctions.”

item.title: Mastercard and Chainlink are enabling 3.5 billion cardholders to purchase crypto directly onchain. @Mastercard’s global payments network + Chainlink’s industry-standard oracle platform = A secure, seamless onchain experience for billions - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1qNG12ZUx1RW5fRGR3YVV5Tzk2YnpmLXNzMERjVzFaQ3RIT2ZjTWVULUFUcUI5MzJ5V0ZZbXNwM25jOGFDZ0VJTDhqQ0h6LXRlUkM5TGdVWTdZWWhmLWRZ?oc=5" target="_blank">Mastercard and Chainlink are enabling …

item.title: TeraWulf Stock Pops as Bitcoin Miner Acquires Kentucky Site to Meet AI Power Demands
item.description: Bitcoin miner TeraWulf’s latest deal adds more than a gigawatt of potential data center capacity in a region eager for economic investment.

item.title: Inaudible Audio Attacks Can Hijack AI Voice Models, Study Finds
item.description: Researchers were able to embed hidden signals in audio clips that silently commandeer AI model behavior.

item.title: UK Issues Sanctions Against Justin Sun's HTX, Other Crypto Firms Over Alleged Russia Ties
item.description: British financial institutions are now barred from doing business with the exchanges—and may face penalties for interacting with crypto transactions that pass through them.

item.title: TeraWulf acquires Kentucky AI data center site with planned 1 GW capacity
item.description: WULF shares surged on Tuesday after the Bitcoin miner announced its latest move to expand into AI and HPC through a multi-phase buildout through 2030.

item.title: UK sanctions Huobi and ruble stablecoin issuer in crackdown on Russia crypto networks
item.description: Britain applied banking-style sanctions to crypto exchanges for the first time, requiring U.K. financial firms to freeze funds and trace transactions.

item.title: Spanish authorities block Polymarket and Kalshi over gambling laws
item.description: Spain joined a growing list of national authorities restricting or banning prediction market platforms amid concerns over unlicensed gambling activities.

item.title: CME Expands Crypto Derivatives Offering With AVAX and SUI Futures Launch CME Group announced that Avalanche (AVAX) and Sui (SUI) futures are now live for trading. CME said the new products are designed to give institutional and professional traders - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBkTE5iX0ljWEI0NXpxUlF1enV0bFAyMUZBRzlwTEZrRVMtR3EyZFgwVW80bkZNVENFWHE2VzFSa2FuWk1zU19pcXJSWHU3WUNPZ18yS0UtM1FZWHNWSDh2akRNVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">CME Expands Crypto Derivatives O…

item.title: Bitcoin 'liquidation hunts' control BTC at $77K amid new Iran peace deal doubts
item.description: Bitcoin failed to copy US stocks' upside after a spike to $78,000 became one of a series of liquidity grabs.

item.title: NEAR token price has 'potential to grow 20x,' says Arthur Hayes
item.description: NEAR is mirroring a 2023–2024 fractal that preceded a 250% rally, hinting at similar upside in 2026 as privacy coin demand grows.

item.title: Bermuda, the small island nation with huge crypto ambitions
item.description: The government recently announced it would become the world’s first economy to go fully onchain, a move officials believe will bring its people new opportunities.

item.title: Ethereum still dominates tokenized assets, consistent with its headstart in DeFi and institutional adoption. Ethereum: $15.7 billion BNB Chain: $4B Solana: $2.2B Stellar: $1.7B Liquid Network: $1.5B XRP Ledger, ZKsync Era, Arbitrum: ~$1B each Rather than c - x.com

item.title: Coinbase’s Base launches AI tool for ChatGPT to manage crypto wallets and DeFi apps
item.description: The product, called Base MCP, connects a user’s Base Account to AI clients such as ChatGPT, Claude and Cursor using the Model Context Protocol (MCP), an emerging standard that allows AI systems to securely interface with external tools and…

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Makes Biggest Ethereum Buy Yet in 2026
item.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies made its largest Ethereum acquisition yet this year—just weeks after saying it might slow down its ETH buys.
